message:
fix(fs,runtime,decoding): eliminate clippy warnings, fix io_uring API ergonomics, and tighten test assertions

Filesystem (fs/):
- Change uring_submit_one to take &Entry instead of owned Entry to avoid
  unnecessary moves (dir.rs, path_ops.rs)
- Remove redundant `return` statements in cfg-gated io_uring blocks where
  the expression is already the block's tail value (dir.rs, path_ops.rs)
- Replace deprecated io::Error::new(Other, msg) with io::Error::other() (dir.rs)
- Expand io_uring read/write tests and add vectored I/O edge cases (uring.rs)

Runtime:
- Add runtime builder validation tests for invalid configurations and
  fallback defaults (builder.rs)
- Tighten io_uring reactor SQE batch submission tests (reactor/io_uring.rs)
- Add priority scheduler preemption and starvation-resistance tests
  (scheduler/priority.rs)

Decoding:
- Fix flaky single-symbol decode test by increasing data size so K > 1,
  preventing the first symbol from completing the block (decoding.rs)
- Narrow SymbolAcceptResult match to exclude BlockComplete for single-symbol
  feed, which was incorrectly passing when K=1

Misc:
- Simplify notify waiter slab tests by inlining lock scope (notify.rs)
- Add ServiceBuilder::layer_ref coverage in clone test (service/builder.rs)
- Minor symbol/symbol_set test additions (types/)
- Update test_utils helpers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
